name: dotCMS
description: dotCMS — Java-based headless CMS with REST and GraphQL content APIs, workflow engine, and multi-tenant support.

seo.title: dotCMS — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: dotCMS: dotCMS — Java-based headless CMS with REST and GraphQL content APIs, workflow engine, and multi-tenant support.

when_to_use: Enterprise Java headless CMS with REST and GraphQL content APIs
Multi-tenant content management for large organizations
Workflow-driven content publishing with approval chains
Personalized content delivery with rules and targeting engine
Building complex content architectures with DotCMS templates

pros: REST and GraphQL out of the box
cons: Heavy compared to newer headless CMS
Community smaller than Strapi or Sanity
review.verdict: A capable enterprise headless CMS if you already run JVM infra, clunky for leaner teams.
review.best_for: Enterprises standardized on Java with multi-tenant content needs
review.not_for: Small teams wanting a lightweight, JS-first headless CMS

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
